acceptedPrompts.prompt: Chart how live trading attention is distributed across 'Will Bitcoin hit $150k by June 30, 2026?', 'Will the Iranian regime fall by May 31?', 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026?', 'Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?', and 'Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by May 15?' using 24h volume, current probability, open interest, and spread.
